case_title: KAREN GALLAGHER VS. SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL

COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GALLAGHER, KAREN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALLAGHER, KAREN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT THE INJURY RESULTED FROM A DANGEROUS CONDITION OF WHICH THE DEFENDANT WAS AWARE OR SHOULD HAVE KNOWN ABOUT BUT FAILED TO ADDRESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 12/22/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
